claim: P-10 rerun verdict: NEW. One T1-NEW mismatch introduced by MM-03 patch in UMB conj:t2b Class B clause.
Step 1a CLEAN: grep 'degree profile.*\(?2,2\)?' in UMB main.tex returns 0 hits
Step 1b INTENTIONAL: UMB main.tex retains T0..T3 as primary tier labels per MM-PATCH-APPLY-RESUME directive 'Do NOT rename UMB T0..T3 labels'
Step 1c CLEAN: grep 'Trans-Stratum \$-2/9\$ Conjecture' in UMB main.tex returns 0 hits
Step 1d PASS: two-class form present at UMB lines 51 (abstract) and 242 (conjecture title)

Step 2a MATCH: UMB conj:t2b cites 'T2B Theorem 2 conditional on $S_{12}\neq 0$'; T2B Theorem 2 = thm:k2-stokes 'Class A characterisation' (T2B line 186), header 'conditional on $S_{12}\ne 0$' (T2B line 69) plus Hypothesis~S (line 187)
Step 2b MATCH: UMB conj:t2b cites 'T2B Theorem 3 + Cor.~classB-pi'; T2B Theorem 3 = thm:classB-stieltjes (T2B line 219); cor:classB-pi label exists at T2B line 238

Step 2c FAIL (T1-NEW): UMB conj:t2b line 253-254 asserts Class B limits in $\mathbb{Q}\cdot\pi^{-1}$ universally; T2B Cor. classB-pi proves $\mathbb{Q}\cdot\pi^{-1}$ only for 5 Pure-regime families; the remaining 11 mixed Class B have limits in $\mathbb{Q}(\pi)$ of more general shape (T2B line 260, e.g. $-4/(\pi-2) \notin \mathbb{Q}\cdot\pi^{-1}$). UMB universal claim is strictly stronger than T2B proves and is contradicted by T2B's own example.
Step 3a PASS: UMB rem:tier-translation lines 140-151 inclusions O_0 subset T_0 union T_2, O_1/O_2 subset T_2, O_3 subset T_3 are plausible given UMB T0..T3 definitions and #14 obstruction tiers
Step 3b PASS: UMB rem:t2b-prerev lines 261-269 DOI \href{https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19885550} is syntactically valid
Step 3c PASS: other Class B / +1/4 mentions at UMB lines 52 and 266 consistent with new conjecture form

Secondary observation OBS-T2B-INTERNAL-INCONSISTENCY (out of scope): T2B Cor. classB-pi title says $\mathbb{Q}(\pi)$ body says $\mathbb{Q}\cdot\pi^{-1}$ — internal mismatch in T2B v2.0; not introduced by MM patches; flag for T2B v3 release prep
